lab: ning yuan xiang xin wo men qian shi you yue jin sheng de ai qing gu shi bu hui zai gai bian ning yuan yong zhe yi sheng deng ni fa xian wo yi zhi zai ni shen pang cong wei zou yuan
lab_without_tone: ning yuan xiang xin wo men qian shi you yue jin sheng de ai qing gu shi bu hui zai gai bian ning yuan yong zhe yi sheng deng ni fa xian wo yi zhi zai ni shen pang cong wei zou yuan
raw_text:
宁愿相信我们前世有约
今生的爱情故事不会再改变
宁愿用这一生等你发现
我一直在你身旁
从未走远
